backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining types (OIData, MarketDynamics, Signal) and public functions to fetch market dynamics, historical data, calculate trade signals (long buildup, short buildup, long unwinding), and retrieve time series data for options trading.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module defining old actor state types (OldOpenInterestData, OldOIAlert, OldTradingSignal, OldActor) and a run function that migrates from the old state to an empty new Actor state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features: TrueData API integration replacing Alpha Vantage, OI data table column ordering, 1-minute auto-refresh polling, alert system for OI/price changes, and frontend dashboard updates for NIFTY focus.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON-formatted summaries of frontend source files including App.tsx, Dashboard.tsx, hooks, components, services, and configuration files for the Nifty Options Monitor application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a dark financial trading theme using OKLCH color system for both light and dark modes, including sidebar, chart, and UI component color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with title "Nifty Options Monitor" and root div mounting point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring QueryClient with 60-second refetch interval, wrapping the app with ThemeProvider (dark mode), SettingsProvider, QueryClientProvider, and rendering Dashboard with Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/AlertModal.tsx: Modal dialog component displaying market alerts for NIFTY options with metric, change value, signal, and timestamp, featuring auto-dismiss after 10 seconds and color-coded signal indicators.
frontend/src/components/AlertPanel.tsx: Empty file placeholder for alert panel component (content truncated or not yet implemented).
frontend/src/components/ExpirySelector.t: Empty file placeholder for expiry date selector component (content truncated or not yet implemented).
Displays a scrollable panel of historical alerts stored in localStorage, showing metric changes (LTP, Call/Put OI) with timestamps, signals, and color-coded indicators. Includes functionality to clear all alerts and limits storage to the last 50 alerts.
frontend/src/components/NiftyDataTable.t: Renders a table displaying real-time NIFTY options data including LTP, Call/Put OI, changes, and trading signals with color-coded indicators. Uses the useNiftyData hook and includes loading states, error handling, and a refresh indicator.
frontend/src/components/RefreshIndicator: Displays a countdown timer and last update timestamp for data refresh, showing when the next automatic refresh will occur (60-second interval).
frontend/src/components/SettingsPanel.ts: Modal dialog for configuring TrueData API bearer token and alert thresholds (OI and LTP changes). Includes token validation, connection testing, and secure localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/config/trueDataConfig.ts: Defines TrueData API configuration including base URL, endpoint paths for ticks/bars/LTP/option chains, rate limits (60/min, 10000/day), and NIFTY symbol constants.
frontend/src/contexts/SettingsContext.ts: React context provider managing application settings including TrueData API token, token validity, and alert thresholds (OI and LTP). Persists all settings to localStorage and initializes the trueDataService with the stored token.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages an Internet Identity-authenticated actor for backend communication. Automatically invalidates and refetches dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAlertTrigger.ts: Monitors NIFTY data changes and triggers alerts when LTP or OI changes exceed configured thresholds. Compares current data with previous values and returns alert data with metric, change amount, signal, and timestamp.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useNiftyData.ts: React Query hook that fetches NIFTY LTP and option chain data every minute, calculates changes from previous data, and determines market signals (Long Buildup, Short Buildup, etc.) based on price and OI movements.
frontend/src/hooks/useRefreshTimer.ts: Custom hook that provides a countdown timer with configurable interval (default 60s), tracks last update time, and allows manual timer reset.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrueDataAuth.ts: Hook for managing TrueData API authentication, providing token storage, connection testing via NIFTY LTP fetch, and validation state management.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes using OKLCH color space, custom scrollbar styling, and utility classes for monospace fonts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying NIFTY options data with a hero header, data table, alert panel sidebar, settings modal, and alert modal components.
frontend/src/services/trueDataService.ts: Service class for TrueData API integration with bearer token authentication, providing methods to fetch NIFTY LTP, option chain data with total OI calculations, and expiry dates.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration with dark mode support, custom OKLCH color system, extended theme with chart colors, custom animations for accordions, and plugins for animations and typography.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking a NIFTY Options Dashboard with TrueData REST API integration, 1-minute polling, signal generation logic, and alert system. Contains architectural notes, existing features (API integration, OI data table, auto-refresh, alerts, dashboard UI), and pending feature requests for real-time data display and signal generation.
